title: First Recipe — Content
description: Add your first recipe inside the main element. Include an h2 for the recipe title, a paragraph describing the dish, an h3 'Ingredients' heading with an unordered list, an h3 'Instructions' heading with an ordered list, and an img element with an alt attribute for a photo of the dish.
starter_code:
# Recipe Collection Website — Step 3: First Recipe Content # Add a recipe with h2 title, description, ingredients (ul), instructions (ol), and image. html = """ My Recipes

My Recipe Collection

Welcome to my favorite recipes!

© 2026 My Recipe Collection

""" print(html)

acceptance_criteria: An h2 heading names the recipe
An h3 'Ingredients' heading precedes an unordered list
An h3 'Instructions' heading precedes an ordered list
An img element with alt attribute shows the dish
Semantic structure (header, main, footer) is preserved
hints:
Ordered steps:
  1. Mix dry ingredients
  2. Add wet ingredients
Image with alt:
